generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor, producing shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTopic
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox, providing secondary shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTopic
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current, used to compute motor torque via motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTopic
]

// Acting component that generates simulation outputs
instance SimulinkSimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulink executable simulation of the first rotary joint of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedMotorTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedMotorVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedGearboxTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedGearboxVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedGearwheelTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedGearwheelVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedSystemTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedSystemVelocityTopic
]

// Data transmitted over MQTT broker
instance MotorEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedMotorVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedGearboxVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulatedSystemVelocityTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

// Measured and simulated data
instance MotorEncoderMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Array of shaft angles measured by the motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance GearboxEncoderMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Array of shaft angles measured by the gearbox encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance MotorCurrentMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Array of motor current samples used to compute torque."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angular velocity from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearboxTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedGearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angular velocity from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearboxVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel torque from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearwheelTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel angular velocity from the executable Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearwheelVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated overall system torque from the integrated friction model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedSystemTorqueTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

instance SimulatedSystemVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated overall system angular velocity from the integrated friction model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedSystemVelocityTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTSensorBroker
]

// Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the first rotary joint."
    DTDFVocab:enables FirstAxisSysMLModel
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink for executable simulation of motor, gearboxes, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorSimulinkModel, GearboxSimulinkModel, GearwheelSimulinkModel, IntegratedFrictionSimulinkModel
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for data linking and provenance."
]

instance MQTTSensorBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for streaming sensor data and simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService, FrictionIdentificationService, ComparisonEngineService, ControlImprovementService
]

instance JavaMatlabProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java/Matlab-based processing component for data analytics."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization platform for real‑time data monitoring."
]

// Models
instance FirstAxisSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block diagram of the first axis (motor + two gearboxes)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the primary gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the secondary gearwheel."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance IntegratedFrictionSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model integrating Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// Services
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualization of raw and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationMonitoringInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics identification of joint friction using analytical and data‑driven models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance ComparisonEngineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison engine for measured versus simulated traces to extract friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComparisonInsight
]

instance ControlImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real‑time control improvement and parameter updates."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

// Insights
instance FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processes continuous identification of friction parameters and informs control algorithm updates."
]

instance DynamicBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides insights into dynamic behavior to help operators adjust machining plans and maintenance."
]

instance DeviationMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualization of raw and simulated data deviation for decision support."
]

instance ComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured vs simulated traces to extract friction parameters."
]

// Actions
instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated update of control algorithm parameters based on friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorPlanAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of machining plans based on dynamic behavior insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenancePlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual maintenance planning identified through dynamic behavior insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time acquisition and processing; data is synchronized with each measurement sample (typically on the order of milliseconds to seconds)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Consists of Asset (first axis), Engineering Model (SysML), Simulation Models (Simulink-based), Processing Component (consumes sensor traces, executes simulation, produces new traces), Data Sources (sensor streams via MQTT, AAS), and Visualization (dashboard)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design and prototyping of the digital shadow during development; validation and deployment during live operation of the robot; ongoing operational monitoring in machining tasks."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity achieved by combining analytical and data‑driven friction models; validation via continuous comparison of simulated outputs with measured sensor data; complete traceability allows each data point to be linked back to its origin and computation method, mitigating uncertainty and tracking parameter drift due to wear or load changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted over IP network using MQTT publish/subscribe; potential use of TLS/SSL for secure transport; Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard interfaces for component-wise data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML and UML class diagrams for modeling; Simulink for simulation; Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for interoperability and data linking, following the digital shadow reference model; alignment with model-based systems engineering (MBSE) standards."
]
